info.title: Static Data API (Combined)
info.description:
Auto-generated OpenAPI specification for static JSON data hosted on GitHub and proxied via RapidAPI.

Base content URL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dipen-Dedania/static-data/refs/heads/main/

get.description: Returns the full Calling Codes dataset as a JSON array.

200.description: Successful response with Calling Codes data

get.description: Returns the full India Festivals dataset as a JSON array.

200.description: Successful response with India Festivals data

festivals.Name: Diwali
festivals.Significance: Festival of Lights; celebrates the victory of light over darkness and the return of Lord Rama to Ayodhya

festivals.Name: Holi
festivals.Significance: Festival of Colours; celebrates the arrival of spring and the victory of good over evil

Main economic artery connecting the capital to Western and Southern ports.

holidays.description: Harvest festival celebrated in various forms across India.
